title: 11 MCP tools exposed, exceeding the 5 required capability categories
evidence: tools.clj:246-349 defines search_matches, head_to_head, team_stats, league_standings, biggest_wins, competition_stats, list_competitions, search_players, top_players, club_player_summary, data_summary
suggestion: No action needed — richer tooling improves the server's utility

title: Comprehensive team-name normalization across 5 match CSV files
evidence: data.clj:79-171 canonical-team with fullname-aliases, keep-state-bases, bare-defaults, final-aliases, parse-team handling accents, state suffixes, country codes, and club-form noise tokens
suggestion: No action needed — addresses the spec's Data Quality Notes on team name variations

title: Cross-file match de-duplication with source-priority ranking
evidence: data.clj:297-340 dedupe-matches groups by [competition season home away] (plus date for cups), picks the best source per group, and handles within-source duplicates
suggestion: No action needed — correctly handles overlapping coverage across the 5 match CSVs

title: BDD test suite with 34 tests and historical anchors for verification
evidence: query_test.clj:91-119 verifies real champion/points for seasons 2003, 2009, 2012, 2016, 2019, 2021, 2022; data_test.clj:84-92 verifies correct 380-match season shape; tools_test.clj:62-109 exercises 23 sample questions
suggestion: No action needed — thorough test coverage with real-world ground truth
